get.summary: Search translation labels in a namespace
get.description: Autocomplete over the labels of a key namespace. Matches a case-insensitive substring of any locale text; a blank query returns the first labels of the namespace. Labels of other namespaces are never returned.

parameters.name: namespace
parameters.description: Key namespace that scopes the labels

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Case-insensitive substring of any locale text

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of labels to return (1-50, default 20)

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid request format or malformed data

401.description: Unauthorized - Authentication required or invalid credentials

403.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions or user status invalid

429.description: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded

500.description: Internal Server Error - Unexpected server error

post.summary: Create or reuse a translation label
post.description: Reuses the label of the namespace whose default-language text matches the submitted one (trimmed, case-insensitive), reconciling its other locales; otherwise creates a new label. The default language is mandatory.
